stemHtml: What does the term "DANGER AREA" describe?

options.a: An airspace of defined dimensions, above the land areas or territorial waters of a State, within which the flight of aircraft is restricted.
options.b: An airspace of defined dimensions within which activities dangerous to the flight of aircraft may exist at specified times.
options.c: An airspace of defined dimensions above the land areas or territorial waters of a State within which flight of aircraft is prohibited.
options.d: An airspace of defined dimensions within which air traffic control service is provided to IFR flights and to VFR flights in accordance with the airspace classification.
